title: eleusine compressa
intro: Eleusine compressa, also known as wire grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical Africa but has been naturalized in other parts of the world, including the Caribbean and the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eleusine compressa include treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts.
